conversation: ER:Hello there, how are you?<%%>EE:Hi<%%>ER:How much do you know about Save the Children?<%%>EE:I know that it is a charity.<%%>EE:I think I have seen some commercials for it in my lifetime.<%%>ER:Were you aware that Save the Children assists both children in the U.S. as well as foreign countries?<%%>EE:No.<%%>EE:I figured they just tried to help children in under developed countries.<%%>EE:That's great that they help people in the U.S. as well!<%%>EE:I think it's important to help children from our country and also others.<%%>ER:Yes, not only do we help out with literacy and school related causes, but also with feeding, shelter, and disaster relief for children all over the world.<%%>EE:That's wonderful!<%%>EE:Are you a top rated charity?<%%>EE:How much goes to administrative costs?<%%>ER:We are a top rated charity, and have been around for nearly 100 years!<%%>ER:Nearly 90% of our funds go straight to children, with the remainder going to fundraising costs and only 5% for admin costs.<%%>EE:Wow! That's really great!<%%>EE:I've seen companies go to 70% and I can't help but judge them for it.<%%>EE:I think this is a fair percentage to have.<%%>ER:We try our best to keep the children first, and have done so in aiding millions of children over the years.<%%>EE:I think that's great!<%%>EE:What country is in the most need right now?<%%>ER:Both Africa and USA currently have the highest number of children in need.<%%>EE:That's sad that a country as powerful as the USA still has problems with children in need.<%%>ER:It is very sad, but with the help of so many millions of caring people we are able to enrich the lives of so many.<%%>EE:What is the money used for mostly? Food? Toys? Clothes?<%%>EE:I think this is all very interesting stuff.<%%>EE:I've never had the chance to talk to a charity before.<%%>ER:Monies go to sustain the lives of children in environments in which basic necessities are lacking.<%%>ER:For example,Syrian children have grown up facing the daily threat of violence.<%%>ER:In the first two months of 2018 alone, 1,000 children were reportedly killed or injured in intensifying violence.<%%>EE:That's terrible.<%%>EE:I hope this kind of environment changes for them.<%%>EE:Children deserve to be in a safe place and to feel secure.<%%>ER:Well, each day children are able to get such needs met by the generosity of those even with donations as small as the cost of about $1 a day.<%%>ER:A little goes such a long way!<%%>EE:I can imagine!<%%>EE:I hope lots of people donate to you.<%%>EE:I bet it's especially good around Christmas when people are in the spirit of giving.
